notes: Fleet missions (slice 2). Dispatch your own warships to work a system — 🎯 cull pirates, 🛡️ guard the lanes, or 🏴 raid shipping — from the ✦ Fleet tab. Unlike hired pirate crews, these are your ships: no fee, and you keep 100% of the bounty/loot. The cost is upkeep plus combat wear — a ship takes hull damage each cycle scaled by the system's pirate activity, and a fragile hull pushed into an infested system can be lost (you still bank what it earned). Bigger hulls earn more and survive longer, so a battleship is the workhorse and a corvette is for soft targets. Raids honor your letter of marque, and you can recall a ship early to bank its take. (Calling ships into your own raids/escorts and freight convoys come next.)
